OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Matt Pietro is present.
Attorney Robert Sellards for the plaintiff.
Defendant Karsten Self present.
Attorney Nate Bigger appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem NORMAN NAYFACH, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of June 1, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
